channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4.6%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: From tourist tax to digital ID: BBC correspondents on the key bills in the King's Speech
item.description: From tourist tax to digital ID: BBC correspondents on the key bills in the King's Speech

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The king’s speech: what is the government’s legislative agenda for the next 12 months?
item.description: The king’s speech: what is the government’s legislative agenda for the next 12 months?

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis
item.description: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: The soft left in Labour is an amorphous beast and although Burnham probably has the support of the majority, there is absolutely no consensus on what to do if Streeting challenges.
Some prefer Rayner, some Miliband,...
item.description:
The soft left in Labour is an amorphous beast and although Burnham probably has the support of the majority, there is absolutely no consensus on what to do if Streeting challenges.
Some prefer Rayner, some Miliband,...

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.description: How Starmer can reassert his authority by sacking Wes Streeting

item.description: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’s address amid Starmer leadership crisis

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Rival Streeting Prepares to Resign and Challenge Prime Minister - Bloomberg.com

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting allies expect leadership challenge against Starmer
item.description: Streeting allies expect leadership challenge against Starmer
